title: Intelligent agent and interface to provide enhanced search
abstract: A set of search results associated with a query is received, the set of search results including for each of search result in at least a subset of the set an indication of an evidence based at least in part on which the search result was included in the set of search results. A search result display interface is generated in which at least a displayed subset of search results are displayed, the search result display interface include for each of at least a subset of the displayed search results an indication of the corresponding evidence based on which that search result was included in the set of search results.
claims:
Claims 1. A system, comprising: a communication interface; and a processor coupled to the communication interface and configured to: receive via the communication interface a set of search results associated with a query, the set of search results including for each of search result in at least a subset of the set an indication of an evidence based at least in part on which the search result was included in the set of search results; and generate a search result display interface in which at least a displayed subset of search results are displayed, the search result display interface include for each of at least a subset of the displayed search results an indication of the corresponding evidence based on which that search result was included in the set of search results. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the search result display interface comprises a carousel of cards. 3. The system of claim 2, wherein the carousel of cards comprises cross-aspect scrolling of cards in a priority order. 4. The system of claim 2, wherein the carousel of cards comprises publisher themed cards. 5. The system of claim 2, wherein a selection of a card from those presented within the carousel of cards opens more information about a result associated with the card. 6. The system of claim 2, wherein a card from those presented within the carousel of cards has a control associated with the card. 7. The system of claim 6, wherein the control comprises at least one of the following: an active element, a button, an input, a scroll view, a reservation button, a reservation time selector, a play video control, and a show image control. 8. The system of claim 6, wherein the control allows a user of the control to directly manipulate content within the card. 9. The system of claim 1, wherein a set of evidence associated with the set of search results comprises at least one of the following: a trusted source; an authoritative source; an aggregation from multiple sources; a factual data; and a data extracted from a source 

 document, wherein the source document comprises at least one of the following: a review; a menu; a listing; an article; an image; a video; and an audio clip. 10. The system of claim 9, wherein the set of evidence is changeable by a user selection. 1 1. The system of claim 9, wherein the indication of evidence allows a user to browse the evidence. 12. The system of claim 9, wherein the indication of evidence includes anti-evidence. 13. The system of claim 9, wherein the data extracted from a source document is split into fragments of data to provide a plurality of evidence. 14. The system of claim 1, wherein the query is associated with a messaging channel. 15. The system of claim 14, wherein a U/I behavior associated with the search result display interface adapts to the messaging channel used for access. 16. The system of claim 14, wherein the message channel allows a user to converse with an intelligent search agent. 17. The system of claim 16, wherein converse comprises at least one of the following: voice conversation, text conversation, SMS conversation, MMS conversation, IM conversation, and chat conversation. 18. The system of claim 1, further comprising: a memory coupled to the processor and configured to store the set of search results; a display device coupled to the processor and configured to display the search result display interface; and an input device coupled to the processor and configured to receive the query, wherein the input device is at least one of the following: touch display, gesture display, keyboard, and microphone. 19. A method, comprising: receiving a set of search results associated with a query, the set of search results including for each of search result in at least a subset of the set an indication of an evidence based at least in part on which the search result was included in the set of search results; and generating a search result display interface in which at least a displayed subset of search results are displayed, the search result display interface include for each of at least a subset of the displayed search results an indication of the corresponding evidence based on which that search result was included in the set of search results. 20. A computer program product, the computer program product being embodied in a tangible computer readable storage medium and comprising computer instructions for: receiving a set of search results associated with a query, the set of search results including for each of search result in at least a subset of the set an indication of an evidence based at least in part on which the search result was included in the set of search results; and generating a search result display interface in which at least a displayed subset of search results are displayed, the search result display interface include for each of at least a subset of the displayed search results an indication of the corresponding evidence based on which that search result was included in the set of search results.
